design_philosophy: A Bloomberg/TradingView inspired dark terminal dashboard for professional quant traders. Focuses on data density, precise monospace typography, and clear P&L signal colors (red/green). Avoids generic SaaS gradients. Conveys trust, real-time speed, and objectivity.

surface_strategy.panels: Flat solid background (`bg-[#121212]`), 1px subtle border (`border-zinc-800`), zero shadow. Never use glassmorphism for trading data (causes refraction/distraction).
surface_strategy.headers: Solid dark background (`bg-[#0A0A0A]`) with a hard 1px bottom border (`border-zinc-800`).
surface_strategy.interactive: Buttons and tabs should have sharp edges (`rounded-sm`), subtle hover states (lighten background slightly, e.g., `hover:bg-zinc-800`), and avoid heavy shadows.

component_instructions.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts. Minimal/no gridlines (or very faint `stroke-zinc-800`). Use solid stroke lines for equity curves. No fill gradients under the line unless extremely subtle (`opacity-10`). Crosshair and tooltip must be highly visible.
component_instructions.tables: Dense. Padding `p-2` or `p-3` for cells. Monospace for all financial figures. Right-align numbers. Color-code P&L text (green/red). Hover state for rows `hover:bg-zinc-900`.
component_instructions.badges: Flat appearance. E.g., `bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 border border-green-500/20`.
component_instructions.cards: Remove default Shadcn card padding and border radius. Override with `p-4 rounded-sm border-zinc-800 bg-[#121212]`.
component_instructions.alerts: Use severity-coded left border (e.g., 2px solid red for critical, amber for warning) on a dark panel.

motion.transitions: Use 150ms ease-in-out for hover states. No bouncy physics, no staggered entrance animations for dense data tables. Data should appear instantly.

user_avatar.description: Professional male trader portrait for user profile icon.

abstract_texture.description: Subtle dark geometric texture. Can be used at 5% opacity for the header or empty states.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="account-equity-value"`, `data-testid="kill-switch-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize data density. Do not use generic large paddings (like p-8) inside data cards.
Ensure all financial numbers use monospace font (`Geist Mono` or `JetBrains Mono`) for vertical alignment.
Positive values should be green, negative values red. Do not use standard UI blue for financial data.
Use Phosphor Icons (sharp/regular weight) or Lucide icons, but keep them small and unobtrusive.
Implement the 'Top KPI bar' as a sticky header below the main nav, styled like a ticker tape or dense stat row.
For the 'Trade History Table', ensure the table is filterable and sortable.
Mock data should look realistic: realistic equity curves, typical MT5 drawdown figures (e.g., -5.2%), and simulated latency or real-time updates if possible.
